executives.name: Drew Zimmerman
executives.background: Mr. Zimmerman has over 15 years of experience in the financial services and resource sectors. He previously served as a derivatives trader and has been involved in various capacities with public resource companies.

executives.name: Stephen Roman
executives.background: Mr. Roman is an entrepreneur who has successfully identified, financed, developed, and operated several mining and oil and gas projects. He was formerly the Chairman, President and CEO of Gold Eagle Mines Ltd. and Harte Gold Corp.

board_of_directors.name: Stephen Roman
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Roman is an entrepreneur who has successfully identified, financed, developed, and operated several mining and oil and gas projects. He was formerly the Chairman, President and CEO of Gold Eagle Mines Ltd. and Harte Gold Corp.

board_of_directors.name: Darren Hazelwood
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Hazelwood has over 20 years of experience in the mining industry, focusing on project management and corporate development.
